name: Cohere API
what_it_does: Enterprise-focused LLM platform specializing in retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), embeddings, and text generation. Known for Command models (generation) and Embed models (semantic search), plus Rerank for search quality.
use_cases: Semantic search and RAG pipelines using Cohere's Embed and Rerank models
Enterprise text generation with Command models for business automation
Document search with reranking for high-precision information retrieval
Fine-tuning LLMs on proprietary data for domain-specific agents
Multi-language text understanding and generation for global deployments
not_for: Consumer-facing chatbot applications (OpenAI has better UX ecosystem)
Organizations needing GPT-4 compatibility (different API format)
best_when: An agent needs enterprise-grade semantic search, RAG, or reranking capabilities, especially with strong data privacy guarantees and enterprise deployment options.
avoid_when: You need multimodal capabilities, GPT-4 compatibility, or broad community ecosystem support.

auth.notes: Simple API key as Bearer token. Single key model — no scopes. Trial key available without credit card. Production key after account upgrade. Very simple for agent integration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial key: 100 API calls/minute, limited model access
pricing.paid_tiers: Command R+ ~$2.50/1M input, $10/1M output; Embed ~$0.10/1M tokens
pricing.notes: Competitive pricing vs OpenAI, especially for embeddings. Trial is genuinely free without credit card. Production requires paid account. Enterprise plans available with custom pricing and dedicated deployment.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clean error responses with message and id fields. Rate limit errors include standard Retry-After. Validation errors are field-specific. Documentation is accurate and actively maintained.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: LLM and embedding calls are stateless — retrying with same inputs may return different generation but no side effects. Idempotency concerns don't apply to generation APIs.
known_agent_gotchas: Cohere API format differs from OpenAI — not drop-in compatible without SDK adaptation
Tool use (function calling) format is Cohere-specific and different from OpenAI's format
Embedding dimensions vary by model version — changing models may require re-indexing all vectors
Rerank endpoint is rate-limited separately from generation endpoints
Trial API key has strict rate limits that may throttle development
Connectors API for RAG has different latency characteristics than standard generation
